div.head: Mr. Hall to Mr. Bayard.

opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States in Central America,
La Libertad, April 1, 1885. (Received April 1.)

div.p: Mr. Hall refers to the Department’s telegram of the 11th ultimo, in which the influence of the United States is offered. He is of opinion that the exercise of his good offices will very probably prevent bloodshed, and, feeling great assurance that the result will be favorable, asks if he may use them.
